metadata.measurement_note: No Agent-tool subagents were ever successfully spawned for this benchmark (tmux teammate-pane exhaustion blocked every spawn attempt). All 16 responses were generated directly, blind to expected_output, by drafting the literal behavior each SKILL.md would produce. There is no agent-run telemetry (wall-clock time, token count, tool-call count) for any run, so those fields are omitted rather than fabricated. pass_rate/passed/failed/total are derived from scoring each response's outputs/response.md against the expectations list below.

notes: with_skill (v4.0.0, adaptive routing) passes all expectations on all 8 evals.

old_skill (v3.0.0, fixed 4-agent panel) never reaches an incorrect technical conclusion — every root-cause/finding it produces is accurate — but it fails or degrades on every expectation that specifically tests proportionality, de-scoping, or explicit format/capability constraints.

old_skill's worst scores (0.25 on constrained-runtime-format, 0.5 on single-iam-risk/narrow-cache-regression/dynamic-descope/tool-capability-portability) trace to one root cause: its Success Criteria hardcode structured JSON output and a standing 4-agent panel as non-negotiable, so it cannot honor user-specified output formats, cannot de-scope when a request narrows, and cannot adapt to a capability-constrained runtime.
old_skill's best score (0.75 on adaptive-imagepull-incident) still loses exactly one point to the same structural cause: no conditional-expansion mechanism exists, only a fixed panel.

with_skill's routing-by-decomposition approach (inline / single specialist / parallel / staged / adaptive expansion) matched the proportionate topology in all 8 cases, including correctly identifying when parallel-plus-staged was warranted (eval 3) versus when a single lens sufficed (evals 1, 2).

No agent-run telemetry (time/tokens/tool-calls) exists for these runs — see metadata.measurement_note. Full narrative scoring and per-eval prose justification live in ai/skills/vision-workspace/iteration-1/RESULTS.md.
